title: VPI on Windows
body:
I've been trying to run vpi in windows by following the
instructions discussed in
http://iverilog.wikia.com/wiki/Using_VPI.

I get this error when compiling: iverilog-vpi hello.c

Compiling hello.c...
hello.c: In function ‘hello_compiletf’:
hello.c:3:33: warning: unused parameter ‘user_data’ [-Wunused-parameter]
    3 | static int hello_compiletf(char*user_data)
      |                            ~~~~~^~~~~~~~~
hello.c: In function ‘hello_calltf’:
hello.c:8:30: warning: unused parameter ‘user_data’ [-Wunused-parameter]
    8 | static int hello_calltf(char*user_data)
      |                         ~~~~~^~~~~~~~~
hello.c: At top level:
hello.c:14:6: warning: function declaration isn’t a prototype [-Wstrict-prototypes]
   14 | void hello_register()
      |      ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~
hello.c:27:1: warning: function declaration isn’t a prototype [-Wstrict-prototypes]
   27 | void (*vlog_startup_routines[])() = {
      | ^~~~
Making hello.vpi from  hello.o...
/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-pc-cygwin/12/../../../../x86_64-pc-cygwin/bin/ld: C:\GNU\iverilog\lib/libvpi.a(libvpi.o): in function `vpi_register_cb':
C:\Source\iverilog-build\vpi/../../iverilog/vpi/libvpi.c:31:(.text+0x3e): undefined reference to `__imp__assert'
/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-pc-cygwin/12/../../../../x86_64-pc-cygwin/bin/ld: C:\GNU\iverilog\lib/libvpi.a(libvpi.o): in function `vpi_remove_cb':
C:\Source\iverilog-build\vpi/../../iverilog/vpi/libvpi.c:36:(.text+0x9e): undefined reference to `__imp__assert'
/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-pc-cygwin/12/../../../../x86_64-pc-cygwin/bin/ld: C:\GNU\iverilog\lib/libvpi.a(libvpi.o): in function `vpi_register_systf':
C:\Source\iverilog-build\vpi/../../iverilog/vpi/libvpi.c:42:(.text+0xfe): undefined reference to `__imp__assert'
/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-pc-cygwin/12/../../../../x86_64-pc-cygwin/bin/ld: C:\GNU\iverilog\lib/libvpi.a(libvpi.o): in function `vpi_get_systf_info':
C:\Source\iverilog-build\vpi/../../iverilog/vpi/libvpi.c:47:(.text+0x166): undefined reference to `__imp__assert'
/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-pc-cygwin/12/../../../../x86_64-pc-cygwin/bin/ld: C:\GNU\iverilog\lib/libvpi.a(libvpi.o): in function `vpi_handle_by_name':
C:\Source\iverilog-build\vpi/../../iverilog/vpi/libvpi.c:55:(.text+0x1c6): undefined reference to `__imp__assert'
/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-pc-cygwin/12/../../../../x86_64-pc-cygwin/bin/ld: C:\GNU\iverilog\lib/libvpi.a(libvpi.o):C:\Source\iverilog-build\vpi/../../iverilog/vpi/libvpi.c:60: more undefined references to `__imp__assert' follow
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
